data.title: Occidental begins cash tender offers and consent solicitations for senior notes and debentures. Details in Offer to Purchase.
data.description: Houston-based Occidental (NYSE: OXY) has recently initiated cash purchase offers for its senior notes and debentures. This includes multiple series of senior notes and debentures listed in the Offer to Purchase and Consent Solicitation Statement dated February 19, 2026. The Tender Offers cover various outstanding notes and debentures, with detailed terms and conditions outlined in the statement. This move by Occidental represents a significant financial decision in an effort to manage its assets effectively.

data.title: Pecoy Copper drills 1,014m @0.37% Cu, 0.13 g/t Au from 17m, extending mineralization 407m below pit shell.
data.description: A significant discovery has been made with 1,014 meters of mineralization containing 0.37% copper found starting from a depth of 17 meters. This mineralization extends 406 meters below the pit shell, showcasing the vast scale and depth potential of the South Breccia site.

data.title: Tradr launches 3 new leveraged ETFs on Centrus Energy, CleanSpark, and Coherent. Feb. 19, 2026.
data.description: Today, in New York on February 19, 2026, Tradr ETFs introduced three novel leveraged ETFs centered on individual stocks. These new funds, which include two long and one inverse fund, cater to the needs of experienced investors and professional traders. This launch emphasizes Tradr's commitment to pioneering innovative investment strategies in the market.

data.title: Canada Nickel and University of Texas sequester 12 tonnes of CO2 at Crawford Nickel Project, creating new CO2 storage pathway.
data.description: A recent pilot program at the Crawford Nickel Project in Canada has effectively stored 12 tonnes of CO2 through in-situ carbon injection. This initiative showcases a new method for permanently storing CO2, which is separate from the Company's existing IPT Carbonation and NetCarb processes. The success of this project marks another milestone in developing sustainable solutions for CO2 storage.

data.title: TechnipFMC reported revenue of $2.517 billion in Q4 2025, a 4.9% decrease from the previous quarter but a 6.3% increase year-over-year.
data.description: In the latest news, TechnipFMC plc (NYSE: FTI) shared its fourth-quarter 2025 financial results. During this quarter, the company reported revenues of $2,517.0 million, showing a decrease of 4.9% compared to the previous quarter ($2,647.3 million) and an increase of 6.3% compared to the same period last year ($2,367.3 million). The company provided a detailed reconciliation of U.S. GAAP to non-GAAP financial measures in the financial schedules. Will you like me to continue providing the rest of the information?

data.title: Americold reported Q4 2025 total revenues of $658.5M, a 1.2% decrease YoY, with a net loss of $88.3M. Full year 2025 revenues totaled $2.6B, down 2.4% from 2024. 2026 outlook includes AFFO of $1.20-1.30 per share. The company has 231 facilities worldwide and aims to enhance profitability and balance sheet strength.
data.description: Americold Realty Trust, Inc. reported financial results for Q4 2025 and the full year ended December 31, 2025. The fourth-quarter AFFO per share increased 3% year-over-year to $0.38. Total revenues for Q4 were $658.5 million, a 1.2% decrease from the previous year. Net loss was $88.3 million (loss per diluted share of $0.31) in Q4, compared to a net loss of $36.2 million in Q4 2024. For the full year 2025, total revenues were $2.6 billion, a 2.4% decrease from the previous year. Net loss was $114.5 million for 2025. The company provided a 2026 outlook with expected AFFO of $1.20 to $1.30 per share.Americold introduced 2026 priorities for future growth, including strengthening the balance sheet and enhancing profitability. Core EBITDA for Q4 was $162.9 million, a 4.7% increase from Q4 2024. The company plans to focus on customer-driven development opportunities and expand into high-value retail solutions. Total liquidity as of December 31, 2025, was approximately $935.4 million, with total net debt outstanding at around $4.2 billion. Americold also reported a 2.7% decrease in Adjusted FFO for the full year 2025. The Company's mission-critical assets, operational excellence, and deep customer relationships differentiate it in the marketplace, ensuring sustained value for shareholders. Americold is a global leader in temperature-controlled logistics and real estate, operating 231 facilities worldwide.

data.title: Rio Tinto gains 53.9% of Nemaska Lithium, aims to revamp Quebec's lithium ops with help from Quebec Govt.
data.description: Rio Tinto (NYSE: RIO) recently announced a major development in its lithium strategy by acquiring a 53.9% controlling stake in Nemaska Lithium. This ownership change comes after investments by Rio Tinto and the Government of Quebec. With this majority ownership, Rio Tinto will now manage the company directly to improve its lithium operations in Quebec. The company intends to capitalize on its expertise in development, operations, and sales to establish an integrated lithium business in the area. The collaboration with the Government of Quebec will persist, with continued investments aimed at the lithium hydroxide plant in Bécancour, which is currently 60% complete. The Government of Quebec is planning to invest up to $200 million in Nemaska Lithium, while Rio Tinto will contribute over $300 million towards this initiative.

data.title: Choice Hotels Intl reported Q4 earnings beat with EPS of $1.6 (+3.23%) vs $1.55 estimate, revenue up $380k. EPS% share increase last quarter by 3.51%.
data.description: Hospitality company Choice Hotels Intl (NYSE: CHH) released its Q4 earnings report on February 19, 2026, at 06:30 AM. The key highlights include beating estimated earnings by 3.23%, with an EPS of $1.6 compared to the estimated $1.55. Revenue also saw an increase of $380,000 from the previous year. In the previous quarter, there was an EPS miss of $0.09, leading to a 3.51% rise in shares. For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: IDACORP, Inc. reported Q4 2025 net income of $43.6M, up from $37.9M in Q4 2024. Full-year 2025 net income was $323.5M, up from $289.2M in 2024.
data.description: IDACORP, Inc. announced its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025, revealing a net income attributable to IDACORP of $43.6 million, translating to $0.78 per diluted share. This marks an increase from the fourth quarter of 2024, which saw $37.9 million in net income, or $0.70 per diluted share. Looking at the full year ending December 31, 2025, IDACORP reported a net income of $323.5 million attributable to IDACORP, amounting to $5.90 per diluted share. In comparison, the full year of 2024 had net income of $289.2 million, or $5.50 per diluted share. The company highlighted that its earnings for 2025 showcased a positive performance.

data.title: CenterPoint Energy posts strong Q4 results in 2025: net income of $264 million; GAAP EPS $0.40 per diluted share. Non-GAAP EPS $0.45.
data.description: CenterPoint Energy, Inc. announced a net income of $264 million, equivalent to $0.40 per diluted share on a GAAP basis for Q4 2025, indicating an increase from $0.38 per diluted share in the same period of 2024. The non-GAAP EPS for Q4 2025 stood at $0.45, up from $0.40 per diluted share in Q4 2024. The notable performance in the fourth quarter was largely propelled by growth and regulatory recovery initiatives.

data.title: Henry Schein One introduces AI-driven Image Verify for clean claims; part of bold vision for efficient dentistry.
data.description: In American Fork, Utah, Henry Schein One has unveiled its latest innovation, AI-driven Image Verify, as part of its ongoing efforts to enhance the dental practice management systems. Integrated within Dentrix and Dentrix Ascend, Image Verify is designed to streamline the claims process in dentistry, aligning with the company's Clean Claims vision. This advancement marks a significant milestone in Henry Schein One's commitment to revolutionizing the industry, ensuring a smoother experience for dental practices.

data.title: Morey's launches the Morey's Seafood Society with Chef Jennifer Hill Booker to offer new seafood flavors during Lent.
data.description: In a recent announcement, Morey has unveiled a new collaboration with Chef Jennifer Hill Booker to introduce a community platform aimed at showcasing culinary traditions alongside innovative flavors. Taking place on ST. SIMONS ISLAND, Ga., the partnership, developed by Morey, aims to cater to consumer preferences as they navigate Lent traditions, with seafood becoming a focal point for many during this period. This initiative provides a space for consumers to explore diverse tastes while upholding longstanding customs.

data.title: UAE representatives join GEC 2026 in India to boost global economic collaboration, enhancing Arab involvement.
data.description: Two representatives from the UAE, Dr. Khaled Hanafy and Dr. Waiel Awwad, participate in GEC 2026 in Mumbai, India on Feb. 19, 2026. This forum aims to enhance Arab involvement in global economic discussions. The event, organized by the Future Economic Cooperation, serves as India's first Global Economic Cooperation event and highlights the importance of collaboration on economic issues.

data.title: US State Department plans to launch online portal "freedom.gov" to provide access to blocked content, led by Undersecretary Sarah Rogers, aiming to counter foreign censorship. The portal will grant access to restricted content like hate speech and terrorist propaganda while exploring VPN feature. Some officials raised concerns, with the announcement postponed. EU, UK also moving faster on internet regulation. Details on benzinga.com.
data.description: The U.S. State Department is said to be working on an internet portal called "freedom.gov" that will offer access to content banned by various governments, including in Europe. This portal is being led by Undersecretary Sarah Rogers and is intended to provide access to restricted material such as hate speech and terrorist propaganda. The site may include a feature involving a Virtual Private Network (VPN) to disguise user traffic as originating from the U.S. and to prevent monitoring of site activity. The launch of the portal was originally planned for announcement at the recent Munich Security Conference, but was delayed for unspecified reasons. Some State Department officials, including legal professionals, have reportedly expressed concerns about the initiative. The State Department has not yet responded to requests for comments. This initiative coincides with efforts in the EU and UK to accelerate internet regulations.
